SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF APR-16-2018 IS CONTINUED TO JUN-04-2018 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED. PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT; NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; JPT: DIANNE PEEBLES; CLERK: B. PAREDES; NOT REPORTED; (D506)

JUDGMENT DEBTOR JASON FORDLEY IS PRESENT. PARTIES NEVER RETURNED FROM EXAMINATION TO INFORM THE COURT OF THE STATUS. CONTINUING TO NOVEMBER AS JUDGMENT AMOUNT IS AROUND $2600. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE NOVEMBER HEARING, MATTER TO BE TAKEN OFF CALENDAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANDREA MCGARY; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
